name: Veal Scaloppine with Chianti
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the cutlets thin and sprinkle with flour on both sides, shaking off excess.
2. Heat olive oil, salt pork, and butter in a skillet.
3. Add onions and sauté until medium brown.
4. Add veal and brown slowly for 3 minutes.
5. Turn over and cook for 2 more minutes.
6. Add salt, pepper, and wine; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Separate mushroom stems and caps. Chop stems fine and slice caps thinly. Discard cores and seeds from peppers, slicing them very thin.
8. Add mushrooms, green peppers, and tomatoes to the veal; cover and cook for 5 more minutes.
9. Chop garlic and parsley together; stir into the sauce.
10. Simmer uncovered until done, about 10 minutes. Taste for salt.
11. Enjoy with Chianti.
